title: Chinna Gounder
subTitle: The village head is a man who sticks to honesty while making judgements. However, when he falls prey to a conspiracy, he bravely fights to ensure that justice prevails in his village.

title: Minnale
subTitle: After falling in love with Reena who is engaged to Rajiv but never seen him, Rajesh impersonates Rajiv and wins her heart. The situation goes awry when the real Rajiv returns.

title: Indru Poi Naalai Vaa
subTitle: Three friends fall in love with the same woman who moves into the house next door. They try to impress her individually in hilarious ways and leave the decision up to her.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Chinna Thambi
subTitle: After an astrologer predicts that their sister will marry a man of her own choosing, three protective brothers go to dire lengths to prevent the prophecy from being fulfilled.

title: Vaanathaipola
subTitle: An older brother dedicates himself to his three younger brothers' success. As a result, he puts their needs first, making personal sacrifices to provide opportunities and support.

title: Uzhaippali
subTitle: A man realises that his father was killed due to a property dispute. Being the rightful heir, he strives to take revenge on the perpetrators and claim the property back.

title: Minsara Kanna
subTitle: Indira hates men and only employs women in her company and personal staff. Kasi enters her life as a driver and soon, one by one, his entire family starts working in the same household.

title: Panakkaran
subTitle: The illegitimate son of a rich man and a singer is raised by a poor drunkard. Before he can commit to the girl he loves, he wants to find out his biological parents.

title: Pudhu Vasantham
subTitle: Under certain circumstances, Gowri ends up living with four boys who are singers. But when her fiance learns of this, Sithara sets out to prove that the boys are nothing more than friends.

title: Endrendrum Kadhal
subTitle: Vijay falls in love with Meenu during a business trip and decides to marry her. However, problems arise when Meenu's brother asks him to leave India and settle in Switzerland with her family.

title: Endrendrum Kadhal
subTitle: Vijay falls in love with Meenu during a business trip and decides to marry her. However, problems arise when Meenu's brother asks him to leave India and settle in Switzerland with her family.

title: Thotti Jaya
subTitle: An orphan named Thotti Jaya is hired by a mobster after he is spotted thrashing a dishonest man. However, his troubles begin when he falls in love with his boss' daughter.

title: Ullathai Allitha
subTitle: Tired of his father's disciplinarian ways and to avoid marrying a girl chosen by the latter, Raja runs away to Ooty. There, he is hired as a driver by the man whose daughter he was supposed to marry.

title: Ullathai Allitha
subTitle: Tired of his father's disciplinarian ways and to avoid marrying a girl chosen by the latter, Raja runs away to Ooty. There, he is hired as a driver by the man whose daughter he was supposed to marry.

title: Ullathai Allitha
subTitle: Tired of his father's disciplinarian ways and to avoid marrying a girl chosen by the latter, Raja runs away to Ooty. There, he is hired as a driver by the man whose daughter he was supposed to marry.

title: Ullathai Allitha
subTitle: Tired of his father's disciplinarian ways and to avoid marrying a girl chosen by the latter, Raja runs away to Ooty. There, he is hired as a driver by the man whose daughter he was supposed to marry.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Nilave Vaa
subTitle: Nilave Vaa

title: Vasanthakala Paravai
subTitle: Ravi, a shopkeeper, falls in love with Uma, a student, who belongs to a rich family. But their relationship is tested when Uma's brother decides to intervene and break their bond.

title: April Maadhathil
subTitle: Kathir, a poor young man, and Shweta, a rich young girl, meet in college and fall in love. However, they are unable to confess their feelings to each other.

title: Vaazhkai Chakkaram
subTitle: Inspector Thangavelu convinces his father to reject the dowry system to marry Kalyani. However, a sudden misunderstanding leads their plans and the marriage in an entirely unexpected direction.

title: Alaigal Oivathillai
subTitle: Love blossoms between two individuals, but their differing religious beliefs create various obstacles in their relationship.

title: Anandha Ragam
subTitle: A fisherman arranges his sister's marriage to a wealthy man, against her wishes. He later discovers the groom is very sick, but his realisation comes too late to undo the fateful decision.

title: Muthu
subTitle: Muthu serves as a loyal servant to Raja Malayasimman, a rich landlord. However, things between them turn sour when they both fall in love with the same woman.
